reference_machine: Apple M5 Pro MacBook Pro, 18 cores, 48 GB RAM
refreeze_reason: The redundant second model generation was removed after deterministic grounded guards covered all frozen gap/conflict cases; the 35-second budget was re-frozen from the resulting ornith:9b pilot with headroom for full-corpus variance.
invalidation_rule: Re-measure and re-freeze when the model, prompt scheme, retrieval pipeline, corpus, or reference machine changes.
